(forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ list_set[T](combined) or x0 ∈ a.underlying_set ∪ b.underlying_set })

goal: finite_set_sum[T, A](fs_union[T](a, b), f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f)
exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique }
finite_set_sum[T, S](s, f) = sum[S](map[T, S](items, f))

p.c: sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) != finite_set_sum[T, S](s, f)
not items.is_unique or sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) = finite_set_sum[T, S](fs_from_list[T](items), f)

goal: finite_set_sum[T, S](s, mul_fn[T, S](c, f)) = sum[S](map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f)))

p.c: sum[S](map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))) != finite_set_sum[T, S](s, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))
not items.is_unique or sum[S](map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))) = finite_set_sum[T, S](fs_from_list[T](items), mul_fn[T, S](c, f))
sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) = finite_set_sum[T, S](s, f)
not items.is_unique or sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) = finite_set_sum[T, S](fs_from_list[T](items), f)

goal: c * sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) = sum[S](map[S, S](map[T, S](items, f), scalar_mul(c)))
map[S, S](map[T, S](items, f), scalar_mul(c)) = map[T, S](items, compose[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f))
compose[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f, x) = scalar_mul(c, f(x))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f, x)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = scalar_mul[T0](x0, x1) }[S](c, f(x))
function[T0, T1: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { mul_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0 * x1(x2) }[T, S](c, f, x)

goal: compose[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f, x) = mul_fn(c, f, x)
compose[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f) = mul_fn[T, S](c, f)
map[T, S](items, compose[T, S, S](scalar_mul(c), f)) = map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))
map[S, S](map[T, S](items, f), scalar_mul(c)) = map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))
sum[S](map[S, S](map[T, S](items, f), scalar_mul(c))) = sum[S](map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f)))
c * sum[S](map[T, S](items, f)) = sum[S](map[T, S](items, mul_fn[T, S](c, f)))
c * finite_set_sum[T, S](s, f) = finite_set_sum[T, S](s, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))
